sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if player and yellow L-shape are now touching/overlapping
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key nodes:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('B', 'c', 'Y') and node['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  id={node['id']} color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")

print("\nAdjacency (large objects):")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    n1 = seg['nodes'][pair[0]]
    n2 = seg['nodes'][pair[1]]
    if n1['pixels'] > 10 or n2['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  {n1['color']}({n1['id']}) -- {n2['color']}({n2['id']})")

# Check ASCII to see overlap
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n--- Player/L-shape area (rows 38-55, cols 40-60) ---")
for r in range(38, 55):
    line = ascii_lines[r][40:60]
    if any(c != 'b' for c in line):
        print(f"Row {r}: '{line}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
